name: Shrimp Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Bottle K.C. Masterpiece BBQ Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix mustard, BBQ sauce, and honey in a bowl until well combined.
2. Place shrimp and mushrooms on skewers.
3. Marinate the kabobs overnight.
4. Preheat grill to medium-high heat.
5. Grill the kabobs over direct heat for 7-8 minutes or until the shrimp are cooked through.
